creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
On Tue, Feb 28, 2012 at 05:48:46PM +0400, Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> ...
> Can people who use sudo test the new port and reply to the PR
> with positive or negative experience?
> ....

I applied the patch, then used portmaster to rebuild the port.  There
were no issues so far.  My use of sudo is pretty simple, so I expect no
issues -- but I do depend on it, so I checked. :-)

This was running:

FreeBSD g1-227.catwhisker.org 8.3-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 8.3-PRERELEASE #332 232155M: Sat Feb 25 05:54:35 PST 2012     root@g1-227.catwhisker.org:/common/S1/obj/usr/src/sys/CANARY  i386

(which was actually most recently rebuilt yesterday; there were no
changes in stable/8 from yesterday to the point that I updated my
local mirror today (r232249)).

Peace,
david
-- 
David H. Wolfskill				david@catwhisker.org
Depriving a girl or boy of an opportunity for education is evil.
